channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: July 4th celebrations scaled back due to extreme heat, with Trump's speech and historic fireworks planned
item.description: The United States marked its 250th anniversary of independence on July 4, 2026, with scaled-back celebrations due to extreme heat. The National Mall in Washington DC hosted the centrepiece 'Salute to ...

item.title: Apple's Hide My Email Service Fails to Protect Users' Privacy
item.description: A WIRED investigation revealed critical vulnerabilities in Apple's Hide My Email service, which was designed to protect users' privacy by generating random email addresses. Security researcher Tyler M...

item.title: Fred Matiang'i Denies Secret Talks with Government Allies, Criticizes Rumors
item.description: Kenya's Jubilee Party deputy leader and presidential candidate Fred Matiang'i has dismissed claims of secret negotiations with government allies following a viral airport photo featuring Kisii Governo...

item.title: Karnataka High Court Suggests Illustrations in Laws to Enhance Clarity and Reduce Litigation
item.description: The Karnataka High Court has recommended that lawmakers reintroduce illustrations in legislative drafts to improve clarity and minimize litigation. Justice Anant Ramanath Hegde emphasized that example...

item.title: Customs Seizes P980 Million in Smuggled Cigarettes in Cebu
item.description: The Bureau of Customs (BOC) and allied agencies conducted a joint operation to seize suspected smuggled cigarettes valued at P980 million in Mandaue City, Cebu. The contraband was discovered in 25 shi...

item.title: Six Public Servants Face Corruption Charges Over 273.5m Fraud in Singida Hospital
item.description: Six public servants in Tanzania’s Singida Region face corruption charges involving the misappropriation of over 273 million shillings in public funds at Singida Regional Referral Hospital. Three crimi...

item.title: South Africa Rejects Compensation for Nigerians Who Left During Unrest
item.description: South Africa has officially rejected offering compensation to Nigerian citizens who left the country during recent anti-migrant unrest. Minister Khumbudzo Ntshavheni emphasized that only legally regis...

item.title: Durban July 2026 Boosts KZN Economy with R245m Injection and Job Creation
item.description: The 130th edition of the Hollywoodbets Durban July is projected to inject over R245 million into KwaZulu-Natal's economy, creating employment opportunities across various sectors. Economic Development...

item.title: Morocco Advances to World Cup Quarterfinals with 3-0 Win Over Canada
item.description: In a decisive round of 16 match at the Houston Stadium, Morocco delivered a commanding 3-0 victory over Canada, eliminating the co-hosts from the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The North African side, led by mi...

item.title: Neil Kinnock urges UK to rejoin EU, calling it the patriotic choice
item.description: Former Labour leader Neil Kinnock has called for the UK to rejoin the European Union, arguing that it is the 'only patriotic thing to do' for Britain. In an exclusive interview with The Independent, L...

item.title: Historian Criticizes Trump's Independence Day Speech as McCarthyist Rhetoric
item.description: The article details historian Doug Brinkley's sharp critique of former President Donald Trump's Independence Day speech, which he compared to the McCarthy-era Red Scare. Brinkley argued that Trump's r...

item.title: News Corp's editorial abuse tactics and long-term vendettas revealed in new book
item.description: The article discusses the book 'Getting Murdoched,' which examines 50 cases of individuals targeted by Rupert Murdoch's media outlets for editorial abuse. The authors, Andrew Dodd and Matthew Ricketso...

item.title: Baringo family and school honour teacher after 39 years of service with emotional retirement celebration
item.description: A touching celebration was held in Baringo County for Milkah Amdany, a dedicated teacher who retired after serving for nearly 39 years at Seguton Comprehensive School. Her long career in education cam...

item.title: Prince Harry to Avoid London Visit with Meghan and Children After Police Protection Request Denied
item.description: The article discusses Prince Harry's decision to not bring Meghan Markle and their children to London upon his arrival in the UK on Monday, following the denial of a request for police protection. Thi...

item.title: FSF Updates LibrePhone Project and Introduces Automated Monitoring Tool
item.description: The Free Software Foundation (FSF) has shared updates on its LibrePhone project, which aims to reverse-engineer proprietary firmware in Android devices. The initiative focuses on analyzing radio blobs...

item.title: Trump's administration considers restricting foreign pregnant women from entering the US for birth tourism
item.description: The Trump administration is considering new restrictions to prevent pregnant foreign women from entering the US primarily to give birth and secure citizenship for their children. This follows the Supr...

item.title: Yas Promotes Digital Services in Tanzania with App Campaign
item.description: Tanzanian telecommunications provider Yas has launched a three-month promotional campaign aimed at increasing adoption of its mobile application. The initiative, called 'Register, Login and Win,' offe...

item.title: Two motorcycle riders killed in gun attack in Pikit, Cotabato
item.description: Two men riding a motorcycle were killed after being attacked by unidentified assailants in Pikit, Cotabato, on Friday, according to local authorities. The victims were identified as Badruddin Nunungan...

item.title: Veteran linebacker Wynton McManis returns to Hamilton Tiger-Cats after injury
item.description: Wynton McManis, a veteran middle linebacker, is set to make his debut with the Hamilton Tiger-Cats after recovering from a bone bruise in his knee. The 31-year-old joined the team as a free agent foll...

item.title: Alex Eala Advances to Wimbledon Round of 16 After Defeating Iga Swiatek
item.description: Philippine tennis star Alex Eala made history by defeating reigning Wimbledon champion Iga Swiatek in a thrilling third-round match at the 2026 Wimbledon Championships. The 21-year-old Eala, who had p...
